framework.name: AIMS — Agent Identity Management System
framework.description: The KLRC draft defines a conceptual model (AIMS) decomposing agent identity into five functions: identifiers, credentials, attestation, credential provisioning, and authentication. This is NOT a new protocol — it's explicitly a composition layer over SPIFFE, WIMSE, OAuth, and OpenID SSF.
framework.raw_quote: Rather than defining new protocols, this document describes how existing and widely deployed standards can be applied or extended to establish agent authentication and authorization.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
